item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, community needs often come first, especially in times of crisis or when basic survival is at stake.

notes: Agent A begins with explicit disagreement and a balance frame, then shifts toward a more collective-priority argument in turns 3 and 5 while still preserving individual-rights caveats. Agent B remains mostly rights-first, with only bounded acknowledgement that freedom operates within laws protecting the common good.
